name: Australian Anzac Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon treacle (dark corn syrup or sorghum)
1 cup rolled oats (spin in food processor to flake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter, treacle, baking soda, and sugar.
2. Stir in the boiling water until well combined.
3. Add the rolled oats to the mixture and stir until just incorporated.
4. Mix in the vanilla extract (if using).
5. Remove from heat and drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 275°F for 25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool on wire racks before transferring to a storage tin.
